svg.text: FIDENZA v4 · OBLIQUE — orbited ~38°, depth ×1.9, no shadows: near ribbons swell, far ones haze into the field · 480 standards · 757 prerequisite connections · real data, deterministic · after Hobbs (curated.xyz/editorial/collecting-fidenza) and Cherniak (curated.xyz/editorial/collecting-ringers)
